results.description:
An Apple Books Classic edition.

L. Frank Baum’s The Patchwork Girl of Oz is a sprightly, exuberant romp through his ever-expanding world of silliness and magic. When a botched spell turns the young Munchkin Ojo’s dear uncle into a statue, the only way to set things right is for Ojo to collect six rare and special items from across the kaleidoscopically strange land of Oz.

With him on his journey are a vain glass cat named Bungle and a girl fashioned from old quilts named Scraps—who, newly sprung to life, is a constant source of of goofy optimism, boisterous energy, and nonsense poetry. A fairy-tale classic, The Patchwork Girl of Oz sings with the joy of imagination and play.
